title: Groundwork Atomic Requirement
description: Schema for a single atomic requirement file's YAML frontmatter. One requirement per Markdown file under .sdlc/requirements/<type>/<ID>-<kebab-title>.md. Encodes the BABOK 4-tier hierarchy, EARS notation (functional), ISO/IEC 25010:2023 NFR coverage, and the Volere snowcard (mandatory rationale + fit_criterion).

id.description: Categorical, zero-padded, stable ID. Prefix encodes type: FR->functional, NFR->non_functional, CON->constraint, BR->business_rule, UC->use_case. An optional uppercase category infix is allowed (e.g. FR-ORDER-014).

title.description: Short human-readable title (matches the kebab-case used in the filename).

description.description: For functional requirements: an EARS-phrased statement. For NFRs/constraints/etc.: a clear single statement of the requirement.

rationale.description: Volere mandatory rationale: the WHY behind this requirement.

fit_criterion.description: Volere mandatory fit criterion: a measurable test oracle for the requirement.

ears_pattern.description: EARS sentence pattern. Required for functional requirements only; omitted for other types.

status.description: Lifecycle status. IDs are never re-used; set status to obsolete instead of deleting.

traces_from.description: Upstream traceability: IDs of higher-tier requirements this one derives from. May be empty for top-tier (business) requirements.

traces_to.description: Downstream traceability mapping to design, tests, and code artifacts. Any of the three keys may be omitted or empty.

parent_scope.description: RESERVED. Parent scope ID, or null. Present-but-optional.

allOf.$comment: ears_pattern is required for functional requirements only.
